# Key Findings:

- ANC1 vs ANC4 consistency is strong in most regions (≥90% for almost all; only Central Ethiopia at 87.1% and Harari at 81.0% are lower).

- Delivery vs BCG is the main problem: most regions are <80%, with extreme lows (Afar 0.0%, Harari 4.8%, Somali 7.7%, Benishangul 20.0%)

- Best overall performer: Sidama (ANC1>ANC4 94.3%, Delivery≈BCG 97.1%, Penta1>Penta3 100%).

- Penta1 vs Penta3 is generally good (many ≥90%), but weak in Addis 73.8%, Dire Dawa 72.9%, and Harari 79.7%.

- Best overall performer: Sidama (ANC1>ANC4 94.3%, Delivery≈BCG 97.1%, Penta1>Penta3 100%).
